/usr/bin/c++ -g CMakeFiles/LuxMart_CPP_BackEnd.dir/scr/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/LuxMart_CPP_BackEnd.dir/scr/security/security.cpp.o CMakeFiles/LuxMart_CPP_BackEnd.dir/scr/security/secController/authController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/LuxMart_CPP_BackEnd.dir/scr/security/secConfig/jwtService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/LuxMart_CPP_BackEnd.dir/scr/controllers/controllers.cpp.o CMakeFiles/LuxMart_CPP_BackEnd.dir/scr/database/dbOperations.cpp.o CMakeFiles/LuxMart_CPP_BackEnd.dir/scr/services/functions.cpp.o CMakeFiles/LuxMart_CPP_BackEnd.dir/include/bcrypt/bcrypt.cpp.o CMakeFiles/LuxMart_CPP_BackEnd.dir/include/bcrypt/blowfish.cpp.o -o LuxMart_CPP_BackEnd  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib /usr/local/lib/libboost_filesystem.so.1.87.0 -llibpq /usr/lib64/libssl.so /usr/lib64/libcrypto.so /usr/local/lib/libboost_system.so.1.87.0 /usr/local/lib/libboost_atomic.so.1.87.0
